summary: Tested GIF Picker and Session Manager Visibility Toggle - Both features are working correctly. GIF picker opens, loads trending GIFs from Tenor API, and clicking a GIF sends it successfully. Session Manager visibility toggle (Open to Nearby Surfers) updates state and calls PATCH API correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GIF Picker: The button selector 'button:has-text("GIF")' can match conversation items that contain 'GIF' in their preview text. Consider adding data-testid='gif-picker-button' to the actual GIF button for more reliable testing.

Session Manager: The PhotographerSessionManager.js component has data-testid attributes for visibility buttons, but the actual UI uses LineupManagerDrawer.js with custom toggle buttons. The data-testid attributes in PhotographerSessionManager.js are not being used in the current flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GIF Picker and Session Manager visibility toggles are working. The GIF button in MessagesPage.js is a custom button with span.text-xs.font-bold containing 'GIF' text. The visibility toggle in LineupManagerDrawer.js is a custom button with class 'w-12 h-6 rounded-full' that changes between bg-zinc-600 (off) and bg-cyan-500 (on).

console_logs: [DEBUG] [Messages] GIF sent successfully: {id: ..., conversation_id: ..., message_type: gif}

tests_performed: State changes from friends_only to open_nearby
State changes from open_nearby to friends_only
Toast notifications shown for both states
PATCH API called to update split_mode
